name: NorthEast Community Bancorp, Inc./MD/
summary: PARTI General Northeast Community Bancorp,Inc. (the Company) is a Maryland corporation that was incorporated in May2021 to be the successor to NorthEast Community Bancorp, Inc., a federally chartered corporation (the Mid-Tier Holding Company), upon completion of the second-step conversion of NorthEast Community Bank (the Bank) from the two-tier mutual holding company structure to the stock holding company structure.
